toxicity_notes: Plant pathogen for Rutaceae family plants.

common_names: Phyllosticta Leaf Spot, Citrus Black Spot (disease caused)
toxicity_notes: Plant pathogen; causes leaf spot and other diseases primarily on plants in the Rutaceae family (e.g., citrus). It is not a plant with horticultural care, but rather a fungus that affects plants.
Some species within Rutaceae contain compounds that can cause skin irritation or mild internal upset if ingested. Specific toxicity varies greatly by species.
native_regions: Tropical and subtropical regions worldwide, particularly Asia and Australia
